creator: smh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170363
Revert dns/bind910 back to 9.10.3

Due to the fact that bind crashes with assertion failures in rbt, ISC have deprecated 9.10.4 recommending the use of 9.10.3 instead.

https://lists.isc.org/pipermail/bind-users/2016-May/096851.html

The patch attached reverts dns/bind910 back to 9.10.3-P4 bumping the PORTEPOCH to ensure upgrades go smoothly.
